message:
feat: add session branching, expanded conformance fixtures, and format fixes

- Session branching: navigate_to(), create_branch_from(), branch_summary()
- 34 bash_tool conformance tests (all pass)
- 19+ edit_tool conformance tests
- Code formatting cleanup per rustfmt
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with current status

All 81 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
